data.title: Content Moderation
data.description: Prevents harmful or inappropriate content using AI and manual reviews.
data.technical_spec: Automated systems enhanced by human oversight.

data.title: User Data Encryption
data.description: Protects user data through encryption during transit and at rest.
data.technical_spec: TLS for data in transit and strong encryption standards.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Mitigates Distributed Denial of Service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Incorporates robotic mitigation technology and Google’s infrastructure.

data.title: Authentication Mechanisms
data.description: Strengthens account security through multifactor authentication.
data.technical_spec: Google account integration with two-step verification.

data.title: Security Audits and Patch Management
data.description: Regular security audits and updates to ensure system integrity.
data.technical_spec: Proactive scanning and prompt vulnerability patching.
